title: Auto-run Charlie evaluations on findings and weight delegation by eval performance
summary: Integrated evaluation execution into lead finding flow and upgraded worker selection to include rolling eval performance profiles, with status actioning for input-gap vs agent-error failures.
changes: Added eval-aware scoring signals to lead worker selection.
Added evaluateDelegationOutcome orchestration path with decision logging and memory journaling.
Added intake status branching based on eval fault attribution.
Auto-triggered evaluation from lead findings endpoint and returned eval metadata to callers.
risks: Weighting constants are initial heuristics and may need tuning as sample counts increase.
Early low sample sizes can bias score swings; operator oversight remains required.
rollback: Remove evaluateDelegationOutcome call from findings route and revert delegation weighting to pre-eval scoring.
